title: Dapetz ® Universal Carpet Cutter Vinyl Underlay Runner Flooring Edge Trim Tool 50° Angle Plastic Moulded Handle Sprung Arms Angled Blade for Effective Cutting
features: EFFECTIVE DESIGN: Sprung arms force material down towards the angled blade for sharp and clean cuts every time.
EASY BLADE CHANGE: Single-screw blade change mechanism allows for quick and easy blade replacement.
NON-SLIP HANDLE: Plastic molded handle ensures a secure grip, preventing slips during cutting.
CONSISTENT PERFORMANCE: Ensures satisfaction with each cut due to its efficient design.
CONVENIENT SIZE: Overall length of 230mm, making it easy to handle and use.
description: Product Description HIGH-QUALITY Our universal carpet cutter is made from durable materials, ensuring long-lasting performance and precision for all your flooring projects. VERSATILE CUTTING Designed for carpet, vinyl, underlay, and flooring edge trim, this cutter provides clean, accurate, and effortless cuts on a variety of materials. RELIABLE TOOL With an ergonomic grip and sharp blade, this tool ensures smooth operation and professional results, making it perfect for both DIY and professional use. Dapetz Universal Carpet Cutter Vinyl Underlay Runner Flooring Edge Trim Tool 50° Angle Includes reversible blade for extended working life, 50° blade angle, and overall length of 230mm Single-screw blade change which is a great advantage for changing blades while you need to. FEATURES HIGH-QUALITY VERSATILE CUTTING RELIABLE TOOL
